headline: Is It Time To Reassess Cummins (CMI) After Its Recent Pullback?
summary: If you are wondering whether Cummins at around US$556.07 is still good value after a strong run, you are not alone. This article is designed to help you make sense of what the current price might imply. The stock has pulled back with a 5.4% decline over the last 7 days and a 7.7% decline over the last 30 days, although it still shows returns of 6.5% year to date and 64.2% over 1 year, and very large gains over 3 and 5 years of 137.6% and 132.2% respectively.
